description: Per-module code coverage thresholds for BudgetExperiment solution

BudgetExperiment.Domain.rationale: Financial invariants, MoneyValue arithmetic — immutable primitives demand exhaustive testing

BudgetExperiment.Application.rationale: Core business logic services — budget calculations, recurring charge detection, suggestions

BudgetExperiment.Api.rationale: REST endpoints — validation, error handling, DTOs (achieved, maintain)

BudgetExperiment.Client.rationale: Blazor WASM UI — markup-heavy, inherently difficult to test; coverage is reported but excluded from CI quality gates

BudgetExperiment.Infrastructure.rationale: EF Core repositories, migrations — Testcontainer-heavy, integration-focused

BudgetExperiment.Contracts.rationale: DTOs, request/response types — minimal logic, low risk
